name: Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')
description: The product uses external input to construct a pathname for a restricted directory but fails to properly neutralize special elements like '../' sequences, allowing attackers to access files and directories outside the intended boundary.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides path-like data that flows to STORAGE or EXTERNAL file-access node without passing through a CONTROL node that canonicalizes or allowlist-validates the path
